description_long: This is a large, modern sectional sofa with a left-facing chaise lounge and three main seating sections, upholstered in a light beige fabric. The sofa features two light blue accent pillows, one placed on the chaise and the other on the far right seat, adding a subtle pop of color. The backrest is straight and continuous, with four evenly sized, attached back cushions that provide a uniform appearance. The armrests are straight, padded, and of medium height, matching the upholstery of the rest of the sofa. The legs are short, black, and slightly recessed, giving the sofa a floating look while maintaining stability. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A large, light beige sectional sofa with a left chaise, straight padded armrests, and two blue accent pillows. The design is modern and minimalist, featuring short black legs and a continuous backrest.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the sofa, the left chaise, and both blue accent pillows clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the chaise and the thickness of the armrest, with both pillows visible from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the straight, continuous backrest and the uniform height of the sofa's back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right armrest, the end of the chaise, and the placement of the blue pillow on the chaise.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Four attached, uniform back cushions and four seat cushions, all in a continuous, sectional layout; two loose blue accent pillows placed at opposite ends.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests of medium height, matching the sofa's upholstery, with a simple, boxy profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Eight short, black, cylindrical legs, slightly recessed under the corners and central sections, giving a floating appearance; legs are minimally visible and likely made of metal or hard plastic.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with four attached, evenly sized cushions, providing a uniform and supportive structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light beige fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern; accent pillows are solid blue.
